mapper.select:
SELECT id, material_code AS materialCode, material_name AS materialName, material_description AS materialDescription, model_specification AS modelSpecification, drawing_no AS drawingNo, material_major_category AS materialMajorCategory, material_sub_category AS materialSubCategory, material_property AS materialProperty, status, creator_id AS creatorId, created_at AS createdAt, modifier_id AS modifierId, modified_at AS modifiedAt FROM material_code
AND material_code = #{materialCode}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO material_code
material_code, material_name, material_description, model_specification, drawing_no, material_major_category, material_sub_category, material_property, status, creator_id, created_at, modifier_id, modified_at,
#{materialCode}, #{materialName}, #{materialDescription}, #{modelSpecification}, #{drawingNo}, #{materialMajorCategory}, #{materialSubCategory}, #{materialProperty}, #{status}, #{creatorId}, #{createdAt}, #{modifierId}, #{modifiedAt},
mapper.select:
SELECT mc.id, mc.material_code AS materialCode, mc.material_name AS materialName, mc.material_description AS materialDescription, mc.model_specification AS modelSpecification, mc.drawing_no AS drawingNo, mc.material_major_category AS materialMajorCategory, mc.material_sub_category AS materialSubCategory, mc.material_property AS materialProperty, mc.status, mc.creator_id AS creatorId, cu.real_name AS creatorName, cu.username AS creatorUsername, mc.created_at AS createdAt, mc.modifier_id AS modifierId, mu.real_name AS modifierName, mu.username AS modifierUsername, mc.modified_at AS modifiedAt FROM material_code mc LEFT JOIN sys_user cu ON mc.creator_id = cu.id LEFT JOIN sys_user mu ON mc.modifier_id = mu.id WHERE mc.id = #{id}
AND mc.creator_id = #{creatorId}

SELECT mc.id, mc.material_code AS materialCode, mc.material_name AS materialName, mc.material_description AS materialDescription, mc.model_specification AS modelSpecification, mc.drawing_no AS drawingNo, mc.material_major_category AS materialMajorCategory, mc.material_sub_category AS materialSubCategory, mc.material_property AS materialProperty, mc.status, mc.creator_id AS creatorId, cu.real_name AS creatorName, cu.username AS creatorUsername, mc.created_at AS createdAt, mc.modifier_id AS modifierId, mu.real_name AS modifierName, mu.username AS modifierUsername, mc.modified_at AS modifiedAt FROM material_code mc LEFT JOIN sys_user cu ON mc.creator_id = cu.id LEFT JOIN sys_user mu ON mc.modifier_id = mu.id
AND mc.creator_id = #{creatorId}
AND mc.material_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{materialCode}, '%')
AND mc.material_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{materialName}, '%')
AND mc.material_major_category LIKE CONCAT('%', #{materialMajorCategory}, '%')
AND mc.material_sub_category LIKE CONCAT('%', #{materialSubCategory}, '%')
AND mc.material_property LIKE CONCAT('%', #{materialProperty}, '%')
AND mc.status = #{status}
ORDER BY mc.id DESC
